channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US dominates Polymarket political bets despite geoblock: Report
item.description: New data from Allium suggest that US users are bypassing geoblocks to bet on markets offered on Polymarket’s global platform.

item.title: Strategy will be ‘less important’ in Bitcoin after STRC incident: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan said Strategy's STRC offer of high yields and low volatility was always a questionable fit for buying Bitcoin, as the cryptocurrency offers neither.

item.title: Securitize gains on NYSE debut with tokenized stocks live on Solana, Avalanche
item.description: Securitize has issued tokenized versions of its shares on Solana and Avalanche, marking the first time a newly public company has done so on its debut.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $61K after US jobs data report, AI sector weakness: Did BTC bottom?
item.description: Bitcoin bulls may make a run on $70,000 after weak US jobs data eased rate hike fears and capital looks to rotate into BTC and gold.

item.title: Is Bitcoin heading for $65K? Sharplink buys $16M ETH: Market Moves
item.description: Analysts are divided on Bitcoin's next move, but there's some hope at last. Meanwhile, SharpLink has resumed buying Ether after an eight-week pause, and other market news.

item.title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
item.description: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

item.title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
item.description: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

item.title: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
item.description: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

item.title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
item.description: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

item.title: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
item.description: Researchers say a new jailbreak technique tricked AI models into treating attacker-written text as their own reasoning, bypassing safety guardrails and exposing a deeper security flaw.

item.title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
item.description: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Russia on track for digital ruble rollout on Sept. 1: Central bank governor
item.description: EU authorities already preemptively sanctioned Russia’s digital ruble in 2025 as part of measures in response to the country’s war against Ukraine.

item.title: Securitize tokenizes $295 million of its own stock on Solana and Avalanche amid NYSE debut
item.description: The newly-public company's shares are the largest issuer-sponsored tokenized stock at launch, aiming to make a point against rival third-party stock token issuers.

item.title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
item.description: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

item.title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
item.description: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.

item.title: ELON MUSK: “I'M NOT GOING TO BE PROMOTING CRYPTO, AT MOST, IN A JOKING WAY. IF YOU SEE ME PUMPING CRYPTO, IT'S NOT ME. I DO THINK THERE'S MERIT IN BITCOIN. I'VE SORT OF GOT A SOFT SPOT FOR DOGECOIN BECAUSE I LIKE D - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1hQ3gzdEFZanBnNnJsemVuM01ZZG5qc01MaGtVdlBJSWpLeEJqdHlQdTE1aEZKbmVQT2pUZDdXRWRRVmllLVU5RjZuaHQ2WjlJanFaenA4MmE5TVktSTVqMnlR?oc=5" target="_blank">ELON MUSK: “I'M NOT GOING TO BE PR…

item.title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
item.description: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

item.title: Crypto Shorts Get Rekt as Bitcoin, Ethereum and XRP Rise to Weekly High Prices
item.description: Bitcoin continued rising after hitting a 21-month-low earlier this week, topping $62,000 and leading a broader crypto market rebound.

item.title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
item.description: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

item.title: EToro invests in onchain derivatives platform Extended as brokers race into DeFi
item.description: The broker plans to bring perpetual futures into Zengo wallet and expand DeFi products to its core platform as rivals like Robinhood expand onchain offerings.

item.title: TIGER RESEARCH TURNS MORE BULLISH ON BITCOIN Tiger Research says it is becoming more constructive on Bitcoin, arguing the market is likely in the final stage of its bear cycle. The firm believes most of the selloff has already occurred, with any further - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5SZS15Z3NxX1ZBNnMxSkJtWFNSMGdWaHE5anFhajFwODJWTnNJRXBuam9lRDhMU24ycWd3V1lkcWtGdTdyQTNfV2lPT3NkTG96SEJzRDRBY3draDB6N1E?oc=5" target="_blank">TIGER RESEARCH TURNS MORE BULLISH ON BI…

item.title: Bitwise says STRC selloff signals crypto cycle nearing a bottom, not Strategy’s breaking point
item.description: Bitwise said STRC's volatility reflects a late-cycle leverage unwind, with institutions poised to replace Strategy as bitcoin's biggest buyer.

item.title: VALR, Africa's largest crypto exchange by trading volume, is using Hyperliquid as the onchain infrastructure layer to bring perpetuals to its users. This marks the first time a centralized exchange has integrated Hyperliquid directly. By building on Hyperliquid, V - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1mVTVRRFJtaUl5UWc3OHZnU0g2SFNfeTRJRGpXSWNHSHFkQVdkdWRpLVBjWDkwRjQtcFR2WVJrOXk0a1J3SUx1WmJhUVNTTF9ra1ZoVXI1TkhEWHNubWZIUXo5Yw?oc=5" target="_blank">VALR, Africa's largest crypto ex…

item.title: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
item.description: Ondo's latest partnership adds shareholder governance to tokenized stocks as competition in blockchain-based equity offerings accelerates.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇵🇭 Binance officially receives approval to offer crypto services in the Philippines. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1MMDlFcHBnTjNfQnVKVFhoV3BmY0tYM0llSlM3OFcxYUdXZG0td090b2NyYUEtUkhrQWthNE13QjNPWThsQnZocDRtVjg1ckhRTFlDeUNGUkNhcUY5bGlrZUx3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇵🇭 Binance officially r…

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel failed to disclose a significant purchase of stock in Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy from last November.

item.title: US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million
item.description: ISIS-K allegedly used its media wing to solicit donations via Tron, Monero, and Bitcoin, highlighting stablecoin issuers' growing role in sanctions enforcement.

item.title: SBI Crypto to shut down mining pool that holds roughly 2% of Bitcoin's hashrate
item.description: Miners must redirect their hashrate before the July 31 cutoff, as the pool will stop accepting contributions after that date.

item.title: 📚Solana Summer School: Let these kids teach you how crypto works. (Gentry, no need to apply. We’re ready for you when you’re ready for us). - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE91UWEtREZKRlpGSUlweXlqaVhfeURxMGloWFhRTWVyWVV3bE40VG1icjZxckQxWGhHQ2NTZGxoTnp5dmZtWEtxLS04VWdGcEVuZTFfWUhSY1FDdjVWTFFxQl9yTENvWEk?oc=5" target="_blank">📚Solana Summer School: Let…

item.title: Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares
item.description: Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro underpin a new structure that keeps tokenized securities within existing U.S. market rules, based on the SEC's third-party custodial model.

item.title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
item.description: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.

item.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
item.description: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

item.title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
item.description: The bank said Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds avoidable market uncertainty and should be replaced with equity issuance to build cash reserves.

item.title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
item.description: The Japanese firm's 43,000-BTC stack now sits well below its cost basis, and it has leaned on debt over equity to keep buying.

item.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
item.description: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

item.title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
item.description: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

item.title: U.S. payroll growth slowed sharply in June, with only 57,000 jobs added
item.description: This morning's data could slow market expectations for a Fed rate hike as soon as this summer or early Fall.

item.title: A struggling Nasdaq-listed company that tried to copy Saylor's Bitcoin playbook is completely dumping crypto for AI
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed Korean media company once lined up $1 billion in financing to buy 10,000 bitcoin. A recent filing confirms its balance is now zero as it pivots to AI infrastructure and fights to stay listed.

item.title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Debuts 'Robinhood Chain'
item.description: The market liked it with HOOD shares jumping 8% and their crypto perp dex partner up even more. Plus crypto's latest unicorn is crowned.

item.title: Three years after MiCA became law, Europe's crypto framework is undergoing a rethink
item.description: Europe’s MiCA regime is now up for review, known colloquially as “MiCA 2.0,” through a consultation that closes around September.

item.title: Warsh's comments set the stage for U.S. jobs data to ignite bitcoin, gold rally
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 2, 2026

item.title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
item.description: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Metaplanet buys 2,823 Bitcoin worth $172.7 million 🚀 They now own 43,000 BTC 🤯 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9wNU5rdjV2QUpqN21id3VDY3J3Z3JNSVFlbzFVcW9pcVdEdndqTHNCY1hJMExGMGs0b3ZQT05CcTRySUtKcFVqVVQwRFdjZ0QzY0g1R3UyeVBGT05tT1JOMFgtd3VJZjA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Metap…

item.title: Smaller tokens lead as bitcoin, sol rally in 'first real bounce of the selloff'
item.description: Bitcoin and major cryptocurrencies rebounded on dovish Federal Reserve signals, with speculative tokens like Memecore’s M and Audiera’s BEAT leading gains.

item.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
item.description: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.

item.title: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
item.description: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.

item.title: Bitcoin rises 4% to above $61,000 as inflation fears soften
item.description: Bitcoin rose after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh said inflation risks had eased. A 7.9% drop in South Korea's Kospi on renewed AI chip worries did little to dent the bid.

item.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
item.description: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply fell 15% in Q2 as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted, while Treasury-backed products including BUIDL, USYC and USDY continued to grow.

item.title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
item.description: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.

item.title: ChatGPT developer OpenAI said to discuss offering U.S. government a 5% stake: FT
item.description: The proposal aims to give the American public a financial stake in AI while easing political scrutiny of the industry.

item.title: Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom Demand
item.description: The teenager allegedly helped to breach a luxury jeweler and demand $8 million in crypto, as part of a crew tied to $100 million in ransoms.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin holds above $61,000 as momentum stocks plunge to start quarter

BREAKING: 🇮🇳 Maharashtra becomes India's first state to legally recognize crypto as recoverable property. Authorities can now legally seize, sell, and return crypto assets linked to financial fraud to victims. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE01S3p5aEpEaGhhUS1nYXVmNE50cS16MUYzZnlQTFZOYUlvbDVyMzZlM2JQbnFLQk15RklPdkpoTjdwdXlHZllja19IYTJ4VXcwdVZTVGlnSEFXRWZRcVRKdnd2WQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇮🇳 Maharashtra becom…

item.title: Metaplanet buys another $170 million of bitcoin expanding treasury to 43,000 BTC
item.description: The Japanese firm, now the world's third largest publicly traded bitcoin holder, reported stronger Bitcoin Income Generation revenue.

item.title: Taiko fully restores cross-chain bridge just 10 days after a $1.7 million hack
item.description: The protocol completed a multi-stage recovery that included an independent security review. The TAIKO token has surged as much as 136% in recent trading.

item.title: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked
item.description: Validators and the people who stake with them can now formally signal where the network should go through a new system called Solana Governance Proposals. Any validator with 100,000 SOL behind it can open one, and stakers can overrule how …

item.title: *Metaplanet Acquires Additional 2,823 Bitcoin, Total Holdings Reach 43,000 BTC* - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9VbmJQSWFJMjJkTW44XzNOZUlwWDRNa0poUDJMd1ZmaFg3eXFXWTVoTWliUnp0NklwbVlLeTFnWEZGQ3lDU2ZQeTVFTWNXRTdyS09ranM4Sm4yMFFnLW5xQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">*Metaplanet Acquires Additional 2,82…

item.title: XRP edges higher as whale activity rises while retail traders stay cautious
item.description: New wallet creation hit a three-month high and large-holder activity strengthened, but XRP still needs to reclaim $1.10 before the recovery looks convincing.

item.title: Bitcoin's long-term holders have returned to accumulation
item.description: Long-term holding wallets have shifted to net accumulation from net distribution, according to Glassnode.
